title: osmunda dichotoma
intro: Osmunda dichotoma, also known as the American royal fern, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Osmundaceae family. The roots and rhizomes of the American royal fern have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The plant's health benefits include treating urinary tract infections, reducing swelling and pain, and supporting liver and kidney function. In herbal preparations, the rhizomes and roots of the American royal fern can be dried and used to make teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal purposes.
